what_it_does: Declares a single AXIS dict named 'type' — the archetype/render_kind axis. id/namespace 'type', one discrete field 'kind' enumerating decision-card | graph | selector | instrument | diagram | spatial-material, value_source 'live', and a desc stating render_kind selects the renderer.
observations: the 'kind' field is the catalog of render archetypes (six values in the comment)
desc names this the 'content compositionality' axis
desc cites 'Tim's law' that type is 'n' not a ranked axis — the kind a surface resolves its archetype from
standouts: render_kind selects the renderer — the archetype is data, not branching code
explicit framing that 'type' is unranked ('n'), not an ordinal axis
conventions: same AXIS = {id, namespace, fields, value_source, desc} shape as sibling axes files
single discrete field with enum values listed in an inline comment
notes: The 'what it IS' axis: a surface's render archetype (decision-card/graph/selector/instrument/diagram/spatial-material) is resolved as data and picks the renderer.
questions: Where is the render_kind -> renderer mapping implemented?
Is the six-value enum closed, or extended by adding more archetypes elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — docstring says 'TYPE axis (what it IS — the archetype)' and the dict encodes the render-kind catalog.
intention_signals: Trying to make the surface's archetype a resolvable axis value rather than hardcoded UI branching — so adding a render kind extends a catalog and the renderer is picked by value.
novelty: Explicitly marking the type axis as unranked ('n'), distinguishing categorical archetype-selection from ordinal axes.
contribution: Contributes the type/archetype axis declaration — the catalog of render_kinds and the rule that this value selects the renderer.
summary_for_embedding: A declarative AXIS dict 'type' encoding the render archetype with a discrete 'kind' field over decision-card/graph/selector/instrument/diagram/spatial-material, where render_kind selects the renderer.
intention_for_embedding: To make a surface's content archetype a declared, unranked axis value that drives renderer selection.
